# Final Review Proposal

## Summary

I reviewed `git diff` and then inspected the changed files end-to-end. The working tree diff contains only orchestration metadata updates in `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-5/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-5/run.json`, with no implementation source changes. There are no correctness, safety, or robustness issues to amend from this diff.
